fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Make graph framing panel-aware and keep nodes behind UI panels

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Graph nodes remain visually behind sidebar and in-viewport panels at all times. 2. Camera focus shifts into the remaining visible graph region outside active panels. 3. Dense clusters are biased away from panel edges. 4. Panel-safe layering and framing expose stable validation hooks or reproducible screenshots. 5. Focus and layout updates remain smooth under changing panel states.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer][viewer-api] Make graph framing panel-aware and keep nodes behind UI panels

Release Playwright coverage proves nodes stay behind panels while panel-aware framing and repulsion remain stable under changing panel states.
